title: Third Battle of Ruusan
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Ruusan}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Chandrila (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Chandrila]] |conc= |next=[[Battle of Brentaal IV (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Brentaal IV]] |image= |name=Third Battle of Ruusan |conflict=[[New Sith Wars]] ([[Ruusan campaign]]) |date=[[1001 BBY]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' |place=[[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] |result=Jedi victory |side1=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |side2=[[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Jedi Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]] |commanders2=[[Kopecz]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1=[[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*Thousands of Jedi **[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] **[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] **[[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] *1-man Jedi fighters *2-man Jedi fighters |forces2=*Sith fleet *Sith base *Infantry |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2=Heavy |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|They couldn't possibly have mustered the strength to take back Ruusan. Not without us knowing!"
"It wasn't the Republic. It was the Jedi. Hundreds of them. Thousands. Jedi Masters, Jedi Knights, Jedi Padawans: an entire army of Jedi.|Kopecz breaks the news of the Sith defeat to Kaan|''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''}} The '''Third Battle of Ruusan''' was one of the final battles of the [[New Sith Wars]]. Following the previous engagement over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], the victorious Sith forces established a surface base and kept their fleet in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. Thousands of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] under [[Jedi Lord|Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]]—the new [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]]—arrived on the world to destroy the Sith garrison, while [[Skere Kaan]] and his main forces were occupied with taking the [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]]. The Jedi used one- and two-man fighters instead of capital ships, thus evading the Sith fleet, and their use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] overwhelmed the basic Sith infantry. Kopecz fled to the Bormea sector to inform Lord Kaan of the defeat. The declaration of the Army of Light revealed the reasoning to the recent absence of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] Kaan had experienced in recent conflicts. His suspicions realized, the Sith made haste to Ruusan to re-take the planet, and face his nemesis, Lord Hoth. After the end of the war, the Third Battle of Ruusan would be remembered as one of Lord Hoth's greatest victories. ==Appearances== *''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces Remaster]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The Dark Side Sourcebook]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] {{Imo}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{NewSithWarsNav}} {{Interlang |de=Dritte Schlacht von Ruusan |es=Tercera Batalla de Ruusan |pt=Terceira Batalha de Ruusan }} [[Category:Battles of the Ruusan campaign|Ruusan 3]]
